description: Gate: the proportion of planner actions across the window that ended in a no-op upfront refuse (e.g. `Distill refuses lesson inputs — lessons are the distilled form, not a source.`) is at most 0.05. Above that the planner has demonstrably lost track of which inputs the underlying command cannot service — that's a planner-memory bug, not a transient blip. Skipped when fewer than 50 total actions are present across the window (sample too small to gate on).
